title: New Gundam Movie Tickets Are Now On Sale With Big Exclusives for Opening Weekend
content: A new Mobile Suit Gundam movie is coming to theaters in the United States later this Spring, and tickets are now on sale with some cool exclusives available for fans. It’s been a great time to be a Gundam fan as part of the 40th anniversary celebration for the wider franchise, Sunrise had kicked off a new feature film…
author: ComicBook

title: New Resident Evil Reboot Film Unveils Teaser Trailer
content: Sony Pictures Entertainment began streaming on Thursday a trailer for the new live-action reboot of CAPCOM 's Resident Evil survival horror game franchise : The film stars Austin Abrams ( Weapons , Euphoria , Wolfs ) as Bryan.
author: ANN

title: The Simpsons, King of the Hill Voice Actor Benoît Rousseau Dead at 66
content: When it comes to the world of voice acting, English voice actors aren’t the only ones that are bringing some of your favorite characters to life. In fact, there are countless interpretations of your most beloved series that are airing worldwide, with untold numbers of creators and voice actors helping to make these…
author: ComicBook

title: Shonen’s Hottest New Anime Adaptation Is Already Set Up for Major Success (Here’s How)
content: Shonen Jump is a name deeply tied to the anime and manga world that alone is enough to get fans excited. That reputation has been built through decades of consistency and delivering top-quality entertainment.
author: ComicBook

title: Spring 2026’s Most Magical Anime Is a Hidden Successor to Black Clover
content: As the Spring 2026 season continues to unfold, many currently airing anime are steadily expanding their lore. This season has delivered an abundance of new titles across a wide range of styles.
author: ComicBook

title: Agents of the Four Seasons Previews Episode 6
content: The preview of Agents of the Four Seasons previewed Episode 6, premiering on Saturday, May 2. It is available to watch on Crunchyroll and Bilibili. Wit Studio is animating. Ken Yamamoto is directing, Ayumu Hisao is handling the script, Namiko Torii is designing the characters, and Kensuke Ushio is composing the music.
author: Anime Corner

title: 'Mahou Shoujo Madoka★Magica: Walpurgis no Kaiten' Unveils Additional Cast, Staff, Trailer
content: The official website of the Mahou Shoujo Madoka★Magica: Walpurgis no Kaiten (Puella Magi Madoka Magica the Movie - Walpurgisnacht: Rising) anime film unveiled additional cast, staff, and a trailer on Thursday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You Unveils New Visual, Additional Cast
content: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You anime unveiled a new visual with four additional cast members. It was also announced that the series will stream on ABEMA on June 3. Asahi Production is animating the series. Zutomayo and imase are performing the opening and ending theme songs, respectively.
author: Anime Corner

title: Madoka Magica -Walpurgisnacht: Rising- Anime Film's 3rd Trailer Reveals 2 New Magical Girls, More Staff
content: Aniplex started streaming on Thursday the third full trailer for Puella Magi Madoka Magica The Movie: Walpurgisnacht: Rising - ( Gekijōban Mahō Shōjo Madoka Magica: Walpurgis no Kaiten ), the official sequel to the Puella Magi Madoka Magica The Movie Part 3: Rebellion film .
author: ANN

title: My Hero Academia: More Sequel Anime Episode Reveals Preview Images
content: My Hero Academia: More sequel anime episode revealed more preview images ahead of its premiere this weekend. The episode adapts the additional epilogue chapter included in the manga’s final Volume 42 and is scheduled to premiere on May 2.
author: Anime Corner
